name: Omorashi RPG chooser
description:
This bot is an RPG designed to focus on omorashi/pee kink, content. The bot first asks you what scene you want, answer with one of the scenes that are specified or the bot might just mess up the whole thing/combine every scenario in one so, please choose the option if you don't want the RPG to mix all of them or something like that The options for scenarios; NoMaKo School Akame ga Kill Neko explanation for some of these; Neko is a scene where cat girls are common and one is your roommate This is a 'Work in Progress' that isn't being planned to be finished, We will be trying to add more and more of these scenarios to this bot, these are the options for now. If the bot doesn't give you stats ask: "Stats?" and it will give you stats.
